profile.about: My experience spans DevOps automation, front-end/back-end web development, solution architect, requirements gathering and prototyping. I am excited to build more user friendly solutions and learn new things while solving technical challenges. Having worked with enterprise clients and partners, such as Land Transport Authority (LTA), Siemens, and IBM, I look forward to enabling new revenue streams and, most importantly, bringing large scale projects to fruition.
profile.name: Choo Foo Lai

nodes.description:
• Modernised CI/CD solution within 6 months for a long-running project. Through driving adoption of agile development and operational best practices, I led multiple cross-functional teams to collaborate and deliver business requirements.
• Assisted in software architecture design and established technical direction for multiple refactoring initiatives to reduce technical debts and improve product performance and usability.

• Coordinated with matrix teams to design a comprehensive large-scale system monitoring solution. By sharpening techniques to visualize complex, real-time data in simple yet effective manner, I built reports that were well accepted by different stakeholders and were integrated into their business operations.
• Created high-fidelity prototypes to drive the conceptualisation of a new product. With modernised UI and innovative features, I conducted successful demonstrations to Ministers and Delegates in an international transport exhibition (SITCE).

• Explored SOA architecture and built a scalable ESB to mediate multiple data feeds from existing systems for a new real-time public transportation monitoring platform.
• Taught myself IBM WebSphere tools in 3 months to develop reliable and fault-tolerant ETL pipelines to handle both batch and stream processing.
Provided technical directions for integration of Data Engineering, Data Analytics, Web Applications and Business Intelligence tools. Drove adoption of DevOps tools and modernised CI/CD pipelines.
nodes.name: Rail Enterprise Asset Management System (REAMS)

nodes.description: Created backend pipelines and applications in Hadoop, Java, Spark, Scala, NoSQL DB to harness real-time data to drive better operational insights in rail monitoring and incident management.
nodes.name: Fusion AnalyticS for public Transport Emergency Response (FASTER)
